data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified user interfaces to reduce decision-making time and improve experience.
data.technical_spec: Organizes content in logical, intuitive hierarchies to avoid cognitive overload.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Highly focused on visual appeal to increase perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Design principles ensure consistency, simplicity, and attractiveness.

data.title: Pareto Principle (80/20 Rule)
data.description: Focus on features most important to the user's core experience (e.g., streaming).
data.technical_spec: Optimizes resources on high-impact features to maximize user engagement.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design placement to ensure quick navigation and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Clickable areas and buttons are strategically sized and positioned for ease of access.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping of related content to enhance readability and comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Layout design uses spacing effectively to intuitively group related elements.
